channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump bashed Epstein to Palm Beach police during first investigation, called Maxwell 'evil,' record shows
item.description: A former police chief said President Donald Trump was among the first people to call him when people learned Jeffrey Epstein was under investigation i...

item.title: BP announces halt to stock buybacks as profit falls sharply
'Despicable and reprehensible': China lashes out at UK expansion of visa scheme following Jimmy Lai conviction
item.description: The diplomatic tensions came after pro-democracy tycoon Jimmy Lai was sentenced for 20 years in one of the city's most prominent prosecutions.

item.title: AstraZeneca moves oral weight-loss drug into late-stage development
U.S. urges ships to stay 'as far as possible' from Iran's waters in Strait of Hormuz after boarding attempts
item.description: The U.S. told American-flagged ships to stay "as far as possible" from Iranian waters when navigating the Strait of Hormuz amid heightened U.S.-Iran t...

item.title: Housing affordability package set to advance in Congress amid home-cost concerns
item.description: Wide-ranging legislation would reduce regulations for homebuilders while giving local governments incentives to streamline the building process.

item.title: Underwater mortgages are at a 7-year high. Here's why that matters.
Microsoftâs stock is now cheaper than IBMâs. What that says about the AI trade.
Tulsi Gabbard to testify at Senate Intelligence Committee amid election probe concerns
item.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has said she was at a Georgia election center during an FBI raid at the direction of President Trump.

item.title: Is the U.S. creating any jobs? Is inflation really slowing? We're about to see.
